title: Update mocha to version 3.1.1 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [mocha](https://www.npmjs.com/package/mocha) just published its new version 3.1.1.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency mocha
New version 3.1.1
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of mocha. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/releases/tag/v3.1.1)

3.1.1 / 2016-10-09

🐛 Bug Fix

  • #1417: Don't report done() was called multiple times when it wasn't (@frankleonrose)

🔩 Other

  • #2490: Lint with semistandard config (@makepanic)
  • #2525: Lint all .js files ([@boneskull])
  • #2524: Provide workaround for developers unable to run browser tests on macOS Sierra ([@boneskull])
--- The new version differs by 9 commits . - [`5b83625`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/5b83625b229ba4667e5d687fba3d70134b6619f4) Release v3.1.1 - [`138cadd`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/138cadd92ee2cb2da024826ee4d6d6eed328530f) rebuild mocha.js [ci skip] - [`db04179`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/db04179a0080ca9bce185581695642daca6bca4b) update CHANGELOG for v3.1.1 [ci skip] - [`2bb2b9f`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/2bb2b9fa35818db7a02e5068364b0c417436b1af) lint the hell out of the javascript; closes #2525 - [`1c72d5c`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/1c72d5c006776a84d5e72240b7ee6a23675aadbf) use Chrome for browser tests when run on macOS Sierra; closes #2524 - [`d62b2b8`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/d62b2b88befa12b74e7c8eb7f4fd9fb98e5eef58) use semistandard - [`b99e9b3`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/b99e9b3b0b71d623ffe4829fce24cddefc8cfe3a) remove errant debug in test/integration/only.spec.js - [`a40f28d`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/a40f28d0328c23605dae2a5ae863149429ce0343) Merge branch 'fix-1417-multiple-done-calls' of https://github.com/frankleonrose/mocha into pull/2059 - [`2c52377`](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/commit/2c52377da981383fd23492edd54c1c4edbc3d3b0) Fix #1417: Show actual error, not 'multiple calls to done()' See the [full diff](https://github.com/mochajs/mocha/compare/9915dfbc671f7f5d3cab55acde7356d839c1170c...5b83625b229ba4667e5d687fba3d70134b6619f4). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
